<!-- Thank you for contributing! 日本語での説明も歓迎します。 -->

## What does this PR change?

<!-- A short description of the change and the motivation. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Fix (inaccuracy, typo, broken link)
- [ ] Improvement to an existing skill
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Documentation / meta (README, guides, templates)

## Checklist

<!-- See CONTRIBUTING.md for details. Delete items that don't apply. -->

- [ ] Skill READMEs contain all required sections in order (Description, Capabilities, Example Prompts, Recommended Workflow, Limitations, Related Skills)
- [ ] No safety-critical specs (torque, capacities, clearances) presented as authoritative — "verify against factory manual" caveats in place
- [ ] No content enabling emissions/safety-system defeat, odometer fraud, or immobilizer bypass
- [ ] Internal links are relative and resolve
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under **[Unreleased]** (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] Index tables updated (`skills/README.md`, `README.md`, `README.ja.md`) if a skill was added or renamed
- [ ] If an English skill changed substantially, the corresponding `README.ja.md` was updated (or an issue was opened to track it)
